# Berat Doğan

> Software engineering student (Fırat University, class of 2027) and DevOps Engineer Intern at Soliner. Builds backend and AI systems and ships them the way production demands: containerized with Docker, deployed through GitHub Actions CI/CD, running on AWS ECS Fargate behind Cloudflare DNS.

Currently open to internships and junior software engineering / DevOps roles.

## Background

- Fırat University — B.S. Software Engineering, expected 2027, Elazığ, Turkey.
- Erasmus+ exchange semester at the University of Maribor, Slovenia (Feb–Jul 2025).
- DevOps Engineer Intern at Soliner (Jul 2026–present): containers, CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure.

## Projects

- Trackruit — recruitment-tracking app built with Next.js and Supabase, containerized with Docker and deployed to AWS ECS Fargate behind an ALB, with GitHub Actions as the sole path to production.
- PrePath — AI-powered technical interview simulator; retrieval-augmented generation over 40,000+ questions in Qdrant, with LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuned models. Built with a 4-person team; Berat served as Scrum Master.
- Lyricly.tech — Spotify API web app; backend and full OAuth 2.0 authorization flow.
- Live Streaming Platform — real-time broadcast backend on Node.js and Socket.io.
